title: Schemes with Above-Average Education Impact
description: Write a query joining scheme_budget_utilization and district_policy_outcomes on state_code. Group by scheme_name and use HAVING to keep only schemes where the average education_index across matched districts is greater than 65. Return scheme_name and avg_edu_index.

schema: CREATE TABLE scheme_budget_utilization (scheme_id TEXT, scheme_name TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, allocated_budget_cr REAL, utilized_budget_cr REAL)
CREATE TABLE district_policy_outcomes (district_id TEXT, district_name TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, health_index REAL, education_index REAL)
seed: INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH01','PM Awas Yojana','MH',2020,2035.2,1828.7)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH02','State Skill Program','UP',2020,5000.0,4500.0)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH03','Jal Jeevan Mission','KA',2020,1200.0,1050.0)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT s.scheme_name, AVG(d.education_index) AS avg_edu_index FROM scheme_budget_utilization s JOIN district_policy_outcomes d ON s.state_code = d.state_code GROUP BY s.scheme_name HAVING AVG(d.education_index) > 65

schema: CREATE TABLE scheme_budget_utilization (scheme_id TEXT, scheme_name TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, allocated_budget_cr REAL, utilized_budget_cr REAL)
CREATE TABLE district_policy_outcomes (district_id TEXT, district_name TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, health_index REAL, education_index REAL)
seed: INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH04','Old Age Pension','RJ',2021,900.0,800.0)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH05','National Health Mission','GJ',2021,4000.0,3500.0)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT s.scheme_name, AVG(d.education_index) AS avg_edu_index FROM scheme_budget_utilization s JOIN district_policy_outcomes d ON s.state_code = d.state_code GROUP BY s.scheme_name HAVING AVG(d.education_index) > 65
